name: Content Writer
description: Generate high-quality content for blogs, social media, and marketing
author: NexusClaw Team

prompts.blog_post: Write a {word_count}-word blog post about {topic}. Target audience: {audience}. Tone: {tone}. Include: 1) Engaging introduction, 2) {num_sections} main sections with subheadings, 3) Actionable takeaways, 4) SEO keywords: {keywords}
prompts.social_media: Create {platform} post about {topic}. Requirements: 1) Hook in first line, 2) {character_limit} characters max, 3) Include {num_hashtags} relevant hashtags, 4) Call-to-action, 5) Tone: {tone}
prompts.marketing_copy: Write {type} marketing copy for {product}. Target: {target_audience}. Focus on: 1) Key benefit: {main_benefit}, 2) Pain point: {pain_point}, 3) Unique value proposition, 4) Strong CTA. Length: {length}
prompts.seo_optimize: Optimize this content for SEO: {content}. Target keyword: {keyword}. Improve: 1) Keyword density (1-2%), 2) Meta description, 3) Headings structure, 4) Internal linking suggestions, 5) Readability score
